title: SOL 54pk Kids Glitter Tubes in 10 Assorted Vibrant Colours - Fine for Paint, Nail Art & Crafts, Slime, Fabric. Pink, Silver, Red, Blue, Green, Orange Diamond Dust. Easy-Pour Shaker Pots for Adults.
features: 10 Vivid Colours - you will be spoilt for choice with this fine glitter set of diverse, vibrant and glimmering rainbow colours. We've carefully chosen every colour to create the ultimate glitter craft set. O With our fine glitter set, you'll have access to ten diverse and vibrant rainbow colours that will make your crafting projects sparkle and shine. We've carefully selected each colour to ensure that our glitter craft set is the ultimate glitter collection for any crafter.

Perfect For Arts And Crafts - Our Craft Glitter for Kids and Adults will get you stuck into craft making - decorations, greetings cards, customised clothes - there are so many opportunities with our glitter paint pots. It can also be used for colouring slime and sand at home or at school, glitter for wax melts, resin, or for our your nail art. Our Start shaking and get making today.

Easy Pour Jars Packed With Glitter - our 54 Glitter shaker pots have been packed with up to 5 grams of coloured glitter materials in each tube. User-friendly shake and pour removable lids which will ensure you get the most out of each and every pot.

Versatile Use - Our laboratory tested glitter tubes are safe and convenient to use by children and adults, whether its glitter for card making or slime making or for face and body makeup at festivals, parties or for just looking great!

Raspberry Red, Plum Purple, Orange, Mauve, Orchid, Navy Blue, Sky Blue, White Gold, Midnight Green, and Bright Silver Glitter Tubes: Our ten glitter colours come in tubes containing raspberry red, plum purple, Orange, mauve, orchid, navy blue, sky blue, white gold, midnight green, and bright silver glitter. These colours are perfect for a variety of crafting projects and can be combined for unique and stunning effects.
description: Product Description Previous page Next page Need a Kids Glitter Tubes? Add these items for your DIY Arts and Crafts Project! 54pk Kids Glitter Tubes Add To Basket 10pk Kids Glitter Tubes Add To Basket 20pk Kids Glitter Tubes Buying Options 27pk Kids Glitter Tubes Add To Basket 30 Coloured Glue Spreader Buying Options 1250pcs Mini Pom Poms Add To Basket 120pk Long Pipe Cleaners Buying Options Customer Reviews 4.4 out of 5 stars 51 4.4 out of 5 stars 1,694 4.3 out of 5 stars 23 4.4 out of 5 stars 554 4.3 out of 5 stars 40 4.5 out of 5 stars 81 4.5 out of 5 stars 976 Price £9.99 £ 9 . 99 £4.99 £ 4 . 99 — £6.99 £ 6 . 99 — £4.99 £ 4 . 99 — Perfect for DIY ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Artistic Style ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Long Lasting ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Perfect as a Gift ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Assorted Colours ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ How can I use these glitter tubes in arts and crafts? These glitter tubes are perfect for decorating cards, enhancing resin projects, colouring slime, and adding sparkle to wax melts. You can also use them for nail art or festive face makeup. Are these glitter tubes safe for children to use? Yes, the glitter tubes are safe for both kids and adults, making them ideal for various crafting activities at home or school. Always supervise younger children during use. How much glitter is in each tube? Each of the 10 glitter shaker pots contains up to 5 grams of vibrant glitter. The tubes feature shake-and-pour lids for easy use and maximum control. What colours are included in this glitter set? This set offers a diverse rainbow palette, including Raspberry Red, Plum Purple, Chocolate Brown, Mauve, Orchid, Navy Blue, Sky Blue, White Gold, Midnight Green, and Bright Silver. Can the glitter be used for body and face makeup? Yes, this fine glitter can be used for body and face makeup, ideal for festivals, parties, or fun, creative looks. Just ensure it's applied with suitable adhesive for body use.
